heading: Tichular vs Tilba Tilba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tichular, New South Wales and Tilba Tilba, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tichular has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Tilba Tilba (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tichular or Tilba Tilba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tichular has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Tilba Tilba scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tichular scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Tilba Tilba scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tichular or Tilba Tilba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tichular has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
